headline: FactSet’s New AI Leadership And Crime Platform Meet Valuation Gap Questions
summary: FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) has appointed a Chief AI Officer and Chief Technology Officer to lead its artificial intelligence agenda. The company also introduced an AI-driven financial crime risk management platform focused on financial institutions and capital markets clients. These changes reflect a clear push to embed AI more deeply into core products and leadership decision making. FactSet provides data and analytics tools for investment professionals, and AI has become central...
